case_title: MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC VS. JOHN M. PETERSEN ET AL
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD and eter judgment thereon)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JEFFREY P. PALMER IN SUPPORT OF MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLCS PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON (TRANSACTION ID # 64517317) FILED BY PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MORGAN STANELY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED PER STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY RESPONDENT FINRA. THE COURT VACATES THE RULING ISSUED ON JANUARY 13, 2020 AS A CLERICAL ERROR. THE COURT GRANTS THE INSTANT PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AS UNOPPOSED. THE COURT WILL EXECUTE THE PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH RECITES ALL THE TERMS OF RELIEF MADE IN THE ARBITRATION AWARD. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS) **SEE 2/13/2020 RULING**

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award [Miscalendared For Jan-13-2020]
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling, as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANELY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted per statement of non-opposition filed by Respondent FINRA. The court vacates the ruling issued on January 13, 2020 as a clerical error. The court grants the instant petition to confirm arbitration award as unopposed.

The court will execute the proposed order and judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is granted. No opposition filed. Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling and a proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
